creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As Adam David wrote:

> 	After awhile running "galaxy mode" the program bombs out with an FPE.

Known problem, i think.  This PR belongs into category `kern', or
maybe `bin'.  Our FPU error handling is still not even remotely IEEE
compliant.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
